steps: Contact Nordea Custody to request correction of the withholding rate from 13.5% to 15% as per FI-NO tax treaty for Nokia Oyj dividend
If custodian cannot correct directly, file refund application with Finnish Tax Authority using Form 6163e/6167e for the excess EUR 3,607.50
Provide documentation showing Norwegian tax residency and treaty entitlement to support the 15% rate claim
Follow up with custodian on implementation of Nordic Tax Withholding Agreement procedures for future Nokia dividends

references.title: Vero – Refund Application (Form 6163e + 6167e for corps, 6164e for individuals)
